title: Al Jazeera Day 65 overview: What's happening as Trump reviews new plan to end war?
snippet: Day 65 comprehensive overview: Trump announces Project Freedom to escort neutral ships Monday; rejects Iran 14-point proposal as 'not acceptable'; Witkoff says 'we're in conversation'; Iran Foreign Ministry confirms received US response via Pakistan; 20,000 seafarers stranded in Hormuz; 2,600+ killed in Lebanon since March 2; US gas $4.45/gallon (+49.3% since war start); Iran parliament advancing Hormuz navigation law.
tag_reason: Comprehensive Day 65 overview consolidating all May 3 developments
